title: 10 — Internationalisation
summary: Technical specification of the i18n architecture: locale resolution order, translation libraries, translatable jsonb columns, fallback rules, and locale-addition procedure.
scope: translatable models (Clan, ClanTag, Game, GameRole, GameMatchType, Article, Category, Event)
notes: No frontmatter or ADR/PRD/SPEC path markers. Classified as SPEC because content is dominated by implementation contracts (locale resolution order, jsonb schemas, library bindings, fallback rules, procedural steps) rather than a single decision (ADR) or user-facing requirements (PRD). Some ADR-style rationale appears (e.g., URL strategy round 1) but no Decision/Consequences structure.
